title: Local rule evaluation with write-time enforcement
description:
Implements decision record (dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine.md) section 3.3, 7.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] Local rules evaluate on issue create/update.
- [hard] enforce rules block writes (default); --force bypasses; warn/off behave accordingly.
- [hard] Graph-scope rules are skipped on write.
